---
title: "3.3 - Parameters Grid Search"
output: html_document
---

# Cell 1: Setup and Data

```{r}
set.seed(435)
library(R.ROSETTA)

selected_positions <- read.csv("data/clean/selected_positions.csv")

cat("Data:", nrow(selected_positions), "rows x", ncol(selected_positions), "cols\n")
cat("Classes:", paste(names(table(selected_positions$class)), table(selected_positions$class), sep="=", collapse=", "), "\n")
```

```{r}
best_johnson_param <- list(
    Modulo = TRUE,
    BRT = TRUE,
    BRTprec = 0.6,
    Precompute = FALSE,
    Approximate = TRUE,
    Fraction = 0.99
)

cat("Final Model\n")
ros <- rosetta(selected_positions,
    reducer = "Johnson",
    JohnsonParam = best_johnson_param,
    reducerDiscernibility = "Object",
    discrete = TRUE,
    classifier = "StandardVoter",
    underSample = FALSE,
    roc = TRUE,
    clroc = levels(selected_positions$decision)[1])

rules <- ros$main
quality <- ros$quality

cat("Johnson - Number of rules:", nrow(rules), "\n")
print(quality)

# print top 15 rules
rlsAut <- viewRules(rules[rules$decision=="Human",])
print(rlsAut[1:15,])
```

# Significant Rules
```{r}
sig_rules <- rules[rules$pValue < 0.05, ]
cat("Significant rules (p < 0.05):", nrow(sig_rules), "/", nrow(rules), "\n\n")
tabS <- table(sig_rules$decision)
print(tabS)
for (cls in levels(selected_positions$class)) {
  pct <- tabS[cls] / sum(rules$decision == cls) * 100
    cat("% significant for class", cls, ":", round(pct, 1), "%\n")
}
```

# Top Rules by Class
```{r}
# Top rules for each decision class
for (cls in levels(selected_positions$class)) {
    cat("\n--- Top rules for class:", cls, "---\n")
    cls_rules <- rules[rules$decision == cls, ]
    print(viewRules(cls_rules[1:min(10, nrow(cls_rules)), ]))
}
```

# ROC
```{r}
plotMeanROC(ros)
```

# See Unique & Shared Positions
```{r}
gf <- getFeatures(rules, filter = TRUE, filterType = "pvalue", thr = 0.05)
print(gf$features)

positionsAvian  <- gf$features$Avian          # Features occurring in significant avian rules.
positionsHuman <- gf$features$Human         # Features occurring in significant human rules.

commonpositions <- intersect(positionsHuman, positionsAvian)
commonpositions

uniquepositions_human <- setdiff(positionsHuman, positionsAvian)
uniquepositions_avian <- setdiff(positionsAvian, positionsHuman)
uniquepositions_human
uniquepositions_avian
```

# recalculate
```{r}
rec_rules <- recalculateRules(selected_positions, rules, discrete=TRUE)
```

# Top Rule by class
```{r}
# Top rule for class 0
rules_0 <- rec_rules[rec_rules$decision == "Avian", ]
top_0 <- which.min(rules_0$pValue)
cat("Top rule for class 0 - p =", rules_0$pValue[top_0], "\n")
print(viewRules(rules_0[top_0, ]))

# Top rule for class 1
rules_1 <- rec_rules[rec_rules$decision == "Human", ]
top_1 <- which.min(rules_1$pValue)
cat("\nTop rule for class 1 - p =", rules_1$pValue[top_1], "\n")
print(viewRules(rules_1[top_1, ]))
```

# Clustering Model Rules

Show clustering with heatmap

```{r}

#Hierarchical clustering of model rules
#subsetting the significant rules from the recalculated rules
sig_rec_rules <- rec_rules[rec_rules$pValue < 0.05,]
clusterRules(selected_positions,sig_rec_rules,fontsize = 5)
```

# Visualization
VisuNet
```{r}
library(RCy3)
library(csVisuNet)
cytoscapePing ()
vis <- visunetcyto(ros$main)
```

VisuArc
```{r}

?VisuArc
```
